'''Ulda Frav''' was a tropical [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Hangshan sector/Legends|Hangshan sector]]. Located in widely [[Scout/Legends|explored]] [[Realspace/Legends|space]] by [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]], by [[3998 BBY]] the world was visited by both a group of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who arbitrated a treaty there and the [[Nazzar/Legends|Nazzar]] [[Prince/Legends|Crown Prince]] [[Qrrrl Toq]]. On the planet, the Jedi informed Toq of his potential for becoming a Jedi, which he eventually did. [[Millennium/Legends|Millennia]] later, [[Vlaydm Churhee]] served as a [[Sniper/Legends|sharpshooter]] on Ulda Frav before forming the [[Churhee's Riflemen]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] unit.

==Description==
Ulda Frav was a tropical terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TOTJC" /> located in the [[Ulda Frav system/Legends|Ulda Frav system]], a part of the [[Hangshan sector/Legends|Hangshan sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA Ulda Frav" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Between [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]] and [[3996 BBY]], Ulda Frav was situated on a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] that connected it to the [[Attahox system/Legends|Attahox]] and [[Belasco system/Legends|Belasco systems]], but the [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] route had ceased to exist by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Mandalorian Wars]] of [[3976 BBY]]–[[3960 BBY]].<ref name="TEA Ulda Frav" />

==History==
[[File:QrrrlToq-TSW4.png|thumb|left|200px|On Ulda Frav, Qrrl Toq learned of his potential as a Jedi.]]
As early as 5000 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], Ulda Frav was a part of the area known as the "civilized [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]" that had been widely [[Scout/Legends|explored]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="TEA Ulda Frav" /> At some point before the [[Freedon Nadd Uprising]]<ref name="TOTJC" /> of [[3998 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> a group of several [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] arbitrated a treaty on Ulda Frav. At that time, [[Prince/Legends|Crown Prince]] [[Qrrrl Toq]] of the isolated<ref name="TOTJC" /> [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="EAOC Nazzri">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Nazzri system/Legends|Nazzri system]]</ref> planet [[Nazzri]] also visited Ulda Frav as part of his self-imposed [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|exile]] known as [[boqeri]]. The [[Nazzar/Legends|Nazzar]] approached the Jedi mediators and began to question them, but the latter cut the [[Monarchy/Legends|crown]] prince short, instead announcing to Toq that he possessed the potential to become a Jedi himself. In response, the Nazzar surprised the Jedi by stating that he had never heard of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. The Jedi requested that Toq join them on their return journey to the planet [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]],<ref name="TOTJC" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] headquarters of the Jedi Order,<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> after which the crown prince became a Jedi himself.<ref name="TOTJC" />

As part of the [[Krath Holy Crusade]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] of 3996 BBY, the military forces of the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] cult passed through the Ulda Frav [[Star system/Legends|system]] before [[Battle of the Attahox system|confronting]] the forces of the Republic in the Attahox system.<ref name="TEA Ulda Frav" /> Later, [[Vlaydm Churhee]] served as a [[Sniper/Legends|sharpshooter]] in the [[Army of the First Line]] on Ulda Frav. In the [[Standard decade/Legends|decade]] following the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]<ref name="GaW">''[[Galaxy at War]]''</ref> in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="TEA" /> Churhee drew upon his heritage of serving on Ulda Frav to form the [[Churhee's Riflemen]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] unit.<ref name="GaW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ulda Frav was first mentioned in the [[1996]] [[roleplaying game]] sourcebook ''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'', written by [[George R. Strayton]] and published by [[West End Games]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="TOTJC" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Ulda Frav system, and therefore the planet itself, in grid square P-11.<ref name="TEA Ulda Frav" />
